hero.eyebrow: Trusted by over 2,400 merchants in the region
hero.title: POS and E-commerce in One Unified Platform
hero.description: Manage your inventory, invoices, and installments — from POS to E-commerce — all in one place. Start your first sale within one day.

workflow.title: From Setup to Growth in 4 Steps

steps.title: Register and Add Your Business Details
steps.text: Enter your name and store details in 2 minutes — no credit card required to start.

steps.title: Start Selling from Your First Invoice
steps.text: Add your products and choose your payment method — POS is ready to work instantly.

steps.title: Activate Your Online Store
steps.text: Choose shipping and payment providers — your inventory syncs automatically between branches and the store.

steps.title: Monitor Growth and Make Smart Decisions
steps.text: Unified dashboard for all branches and the store — real-time reports and stock alerts.

pos.title: Smart POS for Every Branch
pos.body: Create unlimited points of sale for all your branches with a fast and simple interface.

inventory.title: Inventory Always Under Control
inventory.body: Real-time synchronization between POS and the store to ensure accurate stock at every moment.

installments.title: Installments and Collections Without Manual Follow-up
installments.body: Offer installment options to your customers and collect payments automatically without manual intervention.

store.title: Online Store Working for You 24/7
store.body: Choose from over 15 global and local shipping and payment providers to launch your store.

whyPayQuota.title: More Than Just Billing Software
whyPayQuota.subtitle: We are your partner in growth and scaling your business in the Saudi market and the region.

items.title: Multi-POS for Every Plan
items.body: One plan covers multiple branches — no extra fees for each new point of sale.

items.title: Unified Inventory Between Branches and Store
items.body: Real-time sync — what's sold in-store is instantly deducted from the online store.

items.title: Fully Integrated Installment Collection
items.body: No external service needed — offer installments and collect automatically from the same platform.

items.title: 24/7 Authentic Arabic Support
items.body: Arabic support team that understands the local market and its requirements.

faq.title: Everything You Need to Know About PayQuota

items.q: Can I create more than one point of sale on the same account?
items.a: Yes, each plan allows a set number of POS terminals. The Starter plan starts with one, Growth up to 5, and Enterprise is unlimited.

items.q: Does inventory sync automatically between branches and the store?
items.a: Yes, synchronization is instantaneous. Once a product is sold from any POS or the online store, the quantity is updated across all interfaces automatically.

items.q: Which shipping and payment providers are supported?
items.a: We support over 15 shipping and payment providers, including Aramex, SMSA, Mada, Visa/Mastercard, plus support for Tamara and Tabby for installments.

items.q: Is there a contract or long-term commitment?
items.a: Not at all. You can cancel at any time. Subscriptions are monthly or annual without long-term binding contracts.
Yes, we have a custom plan and add-ons that support the restaurant and cafe sector, including table and kitchen management.

items.q: How does the free trial work?
items.a: You can try all the features of the system for 14 days for free without needing to enter your credit card details.
